overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character walking through a sunny urban environment with mixed-era architecture, outdoor cafes, and moderate traffic. The character navigates sidewalks, crosses streets, ascends to an elevated pedestrian promenade, and returns to street level.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with commercial buildings and street trees

events.description: silver sedan drives past on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk approaching a street intersection

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: tan colored building with dark graffiti art covering the facade
wooden utility pole with multiple overhead wires
diamond-shaped yellow warning sign with pedestrian crossing symbol
mature deciduous trees with full green summer foliage
vehicles parked along the curb of the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete city sidewalk lined with mature trees and a beige building featuring graffiti art. A silver sedan passes by on the left as the character approaches an intersection marked by a yellow pedestrian crossing sign and utility poles.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection transitioning to elevated pedestrian plaza

events.description: character steps onto crosswalk to cross the street
character begins ascending wide white stone stairs to elevated plaza

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection then climbing stairs to an upper level pedestrian area

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the stairs wearing bright pink shoes

entered.detail: multi-story red brick building with purple awnings and signage
wide light-colored stone staircase leading upward to elevated walkway
dining tables with red and white checkered tablecloths and umbrellas

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street at a crosswalk and ascends a wide white stone staircase to an elevated plaza. A red brick building with purple awnings dominates the view, and outdoor cafe tables with checkered cloths become visible at the top of the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian promenade with outdoor dining

events.description: passing by outdoor cafe seating areas with patrons dining

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated promenade past outdoor cafes and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in white top and dark pants walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: ornate black metal fence running along the edge of the elevated promenade
classic black lampposts evenly spaced along the walkway
strip of green grass between the walkway and the iron fence

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated stone-tiled promenade lined with outdoor cafes featuring red and white checkered tablecloths. The area is bordered by a black iron fence on the right with a grass verge, and classic street lamps line the path. Various pedestrians walk in opposing directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy city street with traffic and parking garage

events.description: character descends stairs back to street level
yellow school bus passes by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: descending the stairs and continuing along the busy sidewalk with traffic passing nearby

notable_agents.action: yellow school bus driving along the street

entered.detail: large historic red brick building with arched windows and stone trim
concrete multi-level parking garage visible in the distance
stone wall running along the edge of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character descends stairs back to street level and walks along a busy sidewalk next to a large red brick building. A yellow school bus and other vehicles pass by on the street, while a multi-story parking structure becomes visible in the distance ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a graffiti-lined city street up onto an elevated pedestrian plaza before returning to the urban bustle below. It begins on a concrete sidewalk shaded by mature trees, passing a beige building and a silver sedan as the character approaches a marked intersection. As the character crosses the street, the perspective ascends a wide white stone staircase toward a red brick building with purple awnings and outdoor cafe tables. The scene then expands along a stone-tiled promenade bordered by a black iron fence and classic street lamps, weaving through a crowd of pedestrians amidst red and white checkered tablecloths. Finally, the camera descends back to street level, moving past a large red brick building and a passing yellow school bus toward a distant multi-story parking structure.
